meta.title: About — WAHM
meta.description: World Academy of Human Movement: our vision, our mission and the global community of human movement experts.

hero.label: About
hero.title: World Academy of Human Movement
hero.subtitle: Global excellence in service of your growth.

vision.label: Our vision
vision.title: Knowledge has the power to transform lives
vision.text: At World Academy of Human Movement (WAHM), we believe that knowledge has the power to transform lives. In a world where approaches to human movement are constantly evolving, our mission is clear:
vision.textStrong: make the most advanced expertise in health, well-being and performance accessible, everywhere.

piliers.texte: Make the most advanced expertise in health, well-being and performance accessible, everywhere.
A rigorous selection of the best experts and courses, with no compromise on quality.
A global community united by the same ambition: learn, grow, share.

vision.outro: WAHM was born from a simple observation: the best training courses are often scattered, uneven in quality, sometimes inaccessible because of language or geographic barriers. We decided to change that.

mission.label: Our mission
mission.title: Bring together, on a single platform, the world's most influential trainers and most innovative content
mission.intro: We select recognized experts in the following fields:
mission.criteresIntro: Every course featured on WAHM meets strict criteria:
mission.outro: We are not a platform. We are the world's reference in e-learning dedicated to human movement.

communaute.label: Our community
communaute.title: WAHM is above all an ecosystem of exchange, excellence and impact
communaute.outro: All united by the same ambition: learn, grow, share.

items.txt: Guaranteeing a smooth, accessible and multilingual learning experience
Bringing together a global community of experts
Helping every user build solid, modern and profitable expertise
Supporting research and innovation in the field of human movement

pourquoi.label: Why we exist
pourquoi.title: Because today's professionals deserve better
raisons: Better than platforms with no standards
pourquoi.outro: WAHM offers direct access to the world's best experts, courses and approaches, with no compromise.

cta.label: Join us
cta.title: Are you a coach? therapist? trainer? enthusiast?
cta.text: Welcome to the first global community dedicated to human movement.
